In [38]:
import scanpy as sc
import pandas as pd
import scvi
import anndata
import numpy as np
In [2]:
adata = sc.read_h5ad("./pons_combined.h5ad")
In [3]:
adata.shape
Out[3]:
(305218, 21205)

adata.shape
Out[4]:

In [11]:
vdf = sc.pp.highly_variable_genes(adata,inplace=False,
                                  flavor="seurat_v3_paper",n_top_genes=5000,subset=False,batch_key="Study")
In [12]:
hvg = vdf.index[vdf['highly_variable_nbatches']==2]
adata = adata[:,hvg].copy()
In [13]:
scvi.model.SCVI.setup_anndata(adata, batch_key="donor_id")
vae = scvi.model.SCVI(adata, n_layers=3, n_latent=30,n_hidden=256,dropout_rate=0.2)
In [ ]:
vae.train()

In [ ]:
vae.save("./pons_scvi/",overwrite=True)
latent = vae.get_latent_representation()
pd.DataFrame(latent).to_pickle("./pons_scvi//latent.pkl")
In [17]:
adata.obsm["X_scVI"] = latent
sc.pp.neighbors(adata,use_rep="X_scVI")
sc.tl.umap(adata)
sc.tl.leiden(adata,resolution = 0.1,flavor = "igraph",n_iterations=2)
In [18]:
pd.DataFrame(adata.obsm["X_umap"]).to_pickle("./pons_scvi//latent.pkl")
adata.obs.to_pickle("./pons_scvi//meta.pkl")
In [19]:
sc.pl.umap(adata,color = "class_label")
In [34]:
sc.pl.umap(adata,color = "leiden",legend_loc="on data")
In [36]:
tab = pd.crosstab(adata.obs['leiden'],adata.obs['Study'])
common_clusters = tab.index[(tab>100).sum(axis=1)>1]
In [46]:
sel = adata.obs['Study'] == "Jin2025"
l1 = pd.crosstab(adata.obs['leiden'][sel],adata.obs['class_label'][sel]).idxmax(axis=1)
sel = adata.obs['Study'] == "Langlieb2023"
l2 = pd.crosstab(adata.obs['leiden'][sel],adata.obs['class_label'][sel]).idxmax(axis=1)
ann = pd.DataFrame({'Jin_pred':l1,'Langlieb_pred':l2.loc[l1.index]})
ann
ann['annotation'] = np.where(ann['Langlieb_pred']=="neuron",ann["Jin_pred"],ann["Langlieb_pred"])
ann['annotation'] = ann['annotation'].str.replace(" ",".")
ann = ann.loc[common_clusters]
ann

In [47]:
adata.obs['annotation'] = adata.obs['leiden'].map(ann['annotation'].to_dict())
In [55]:
outdf = adata.obs.copy()
outdf = outdf[['donor_id','Sex','Age','Study','Sample','class_label','subclass_label','leiden','annotation']]
outdf[['UMAP1','UMAP2']] = adata.obsm["X_umap"]
outdf.to_csv("integrated.cellmeta.csv")
